---
name: "05 Issue: Analysis and local changes"
description: "No-limits demo: full response for an issue"
argument-hint: "Issue to analyze"
agent: "agent"
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (copilot)
---

Analyze the issue and deliver a complete response with no strict length limits.

Include:

- Always reference the analysis to issue 1.
- Diagnosis
- Solution plan
- Risks and mitigations
- Next steps
- Never create an issue, commit, or PR. Only provide the analysis and changes locally, without any action.
